title: roystonea maisiana
intro: Roystonea maisiana, also known as the Mayan thatch palm, is a species of palm tree native to Mexico and Central America. Its leaves, stalks, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits. The herbal preparations of Roystonea maisiana include infusions, decoctions, and poultices made from its leaves, stalks, and roots.
